prompts.name: Layered Fabrics
prompts.text: Add layered fabrics with visible overlap, natural thickness, seam detail, and believable clothing structure.

prompts.name: Frills
prompts.text: Add clean frills along hems, sleeves, collar, or skirt with balanced decorative detail.

prompts.name: Bows
prompts.text: Add fabric bows with soft folds, clear knot structure, and charming placement.

prompts.name: Lace Trim
prompts.text: Add lace trim with delicate patterning, semi-transparent edges, and refined decorative texture.

prompts.name: Embroidery
prompts.text: Add embroidered details with raised thread texture, decorative motifs, and natural fabric integration.

prompts.name: Silver Filigree
prompts.text: Add ornate silver filigree details with curling lines, polished highlights, and elegant craftsmanship.

prompts.name: Gold Accents
prompts.text: Add tasteful gold accents through buttons, trim, jewelry, or decorative metalwork.

prompts.name: Crimson Details
prompts.text: Add crimson accent details through ribbons, gemstones, embroidery, or lining for controlled dramatic color.

prompts.name: Belts and Straps
prompts.text: Add belts and straps with buckles, leather texture, natural tension, and practical placement.

prompts.name: Buttons
prompts.text: Add buttons with correct alignment, material shine, and believable attachment to the clothing.

prompts.name: Pleats
prompts.text: Add pleated fabric with clean repeated folds, natural drape, and structured movement.

prompts.name: Sheer Overlay
prompts.text: Add a sheer fabric overlay with transparency, soft edges, and believable layered material.

prompts.name: Cape
prompts.text: Add a cape or cloak with flowing fabric, clear attachment points, and dramatic silhouette.

prompts.name: High Collar
prompts.text: Add a high collar that frames the neck and face with elegant structure.

prompts.name: Asymmetrical Design
prompts.text: Add asymmetrical clothing design with balanced visual weight and intentional styling.
